results.title: Deniz Undav: "Tonight, there’ll be a frustration döner"
results.description: Deniz Undav spoke of mixed emotions after Stuttgart’s 3-0 defeat to Bayern Munich in the DFB-Pokal final, with the striker disappointed by the result but encouraged by his side’s overall season.��...

results.title: Harry Kane says ‘it’s not the time to talk about’ a new contract at Bayern Munich
results.description: This may be a non-story, but Harry Kane and Bayern Munich always gave the impression that they would work out terms on a new contract at the end of the season. Now, with the DFB-Pokal final won and no more competitive games left, the end of the season is officially here. So we should expect [...]

results.title: GUNTHER Says Italian Crowd Could Turn Him Babyface Against Cody Rhodes
results.description: GUNTHER thinks Clash in Italy could turn into a rare babyface moment for him. Ahead of his Undisputed WWE Championship match against Cody Rhodes on May 31 in Turin, “The Ring General” addressed the possibility of Italian fans cheering for him over WWE’s top babyface. Speaking with the Italian Wrestling Channel, GUNTHER admitted the European ... Read more

results.title: Sports Direct-Parent Appoints Chief People & Brand Officer
results.description: U.K.-based Frasers Group appointed Andy Brown as chief people & brand officer.

results.title: St. Louis City blank Austin, enter break on unbeaten streak
results.description: Fallou Fall and Daniel Edelman scored early and late in the second half as host St. Louis City did more than enough to beat hapless Austin FC 3-0 on Saturday afternoon in a Western Conference clash.

results.title: PFL Brussels results: Patrick Habirora destroys ex-UFC champ Benson Henderson in 20 seconds
results.description: Patrick Habirora may very well be Belgium's hope for a major MMA title.
